episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 431: Early MH3 Results + Assassin's Creed Reveals
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and then dive into the early results from MH3 Modern play and review the most recent previews of the Assassin's Creed set releasing later this month.
